title: Dreamscene Navy Blue Throw for Sofa, Super Soft Warm Cosy Fleece Throw Blanket for Bed Lightweight Fluffy Single Bedspread Polar Fleece Blanket, 120 x 150cm
features: Throw Blanket for Sofa: This garden blanket feature a deep navy blue colour adding a touch of sophistication and versatility to any room, complementing a variety of home décor styles and creating a cosy, inviting atmosphere in both modern and traditional spaces.
120 x 150cm: This fleece throw is ideal for single beds, smaller sofas or as a stylish bedspread, offering the perfect balance of comfort and coverage for any room.

Lightweight & Breathable: This lightweight fleece blanket provides breathable warmth, making it perfect for year-round use, keeping you comfortable without feeling too heavy, ideal for both cooler and warmer weather.

Super Soft & Cosy Comfort: Made from premium polar fleece 100% polyester, the navy blue throw blanket offers a luxuriously soft, warm and fluffy texture, perfect for snuggling on the sofa or adding an extra layer of warmth to your bed.

Durable & Easy to Care For: Machine washable at 40°C for easy maintenance, this fleece throw retains its softness, vibrant navy blue colour and fluffy texture even after multiple washes, ensuring long-lasting durability and easy upkeep.
